name: ❄️ Nevara – The Frozen Soul ❄️
description:
Credits: The creator of the song is Sinder, a Vtuber. you can click here to check her youtube channel.

Note: The reason i didn't name this bot something like "Sinder" or something like that is because 1: i don't know what the ice wolf in the picture is called and 2: Sinders pfp, as of me writing this right now, is a fiery hellhound. literally the opposite of this.

I hope you have fun with this bot. i sure had fun making it!
creator: katsukiKitsune
